-## Current Config (Wk33)
+Maximize cash over 71 weeks (497 days). Starting $1M. **Wk34 START (d238): $137,342.**

+## 🚨 WK33 CATASTROPHE — 0% BILL PAY RATE

+- d230: RivalTech +0.1725, ApexSaaS +0.1725

+My delivered (S1 Plan A T2) = 0.3688. Gap to new expectation = ~0.1-0.2 → 100% cancel at bill time.

+- Outage prob: 2.24%/day → 2.62%/day (+0.38%/day). Marginal.
